name: bulbasaur
flavorText: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKMON.

name: ivysaur
flavorText: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: venusaur
flavorText: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: charmander
flavorText: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: charmeleon
flavorText: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.

name: charizard
flavorText: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.

name: squirtle
flavorText: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

name: wartortle
flavorText: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

name: blastoise
flavorText: A brutal POKMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.

name: caterpie
flavorText: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: metapod
flavorText: This POKMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

name: butterfree
flavorText: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

name: weedle
flavorText: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.

name: kakuna
flavorText: Almost incapable of moving, this POKMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

name: beedrill
flavorText: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.

name: pidgey
flavorText: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: pidgeotto
flavorText: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKMON will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: pidgeot
flavorText: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.

name: rattata
flavorText: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.

name: raticate
flavorText: It uses its whis kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.

name: spearow
flavorText: It flaps its small wings busily to fly. Using its beak, it searches in grass for prey.

name: fearow
flavorText: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

name: ekans
flavorText: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.

name: arbok
flavorText: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

name: pikachu
flavorText: When several of these POKMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.

name: raichu
flavorText: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: sandshrew
flavorText: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: sandslash
flavorText: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

name: nidoran-f
flavorText: Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

name: nidorina
flavorText: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

name: nidoqueen
flavorText: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

name: nidoran-m
flavorText: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.

name: nidorino
flavorText: An aggressive POKMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

name: nidoking
flavorText: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.

name: clefairy
flavorText: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.

name: clefable
flavorText: A timid fairy POKMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: vulpix
flavorText: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

name: ninetales
flavorText: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

name: jigglypuff
flavorText: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: wigglytuff
flavorText: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

name: zubat
flavorText: Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.

name: golbat
flavorText: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

name: oddish
flavorText: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

name: gloom
flavorText: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

name: vileplume
flavorText: It has the worlds largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

name: paras
flavorText: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw ing nutrients from the bug host.

name: parasect
flavorText: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places.

name: venonat
flavorText: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night.

name: venomoth
flavorText: The dustlike scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.

name: diglett
flavorText: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: dugtrio
flavorText: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: meowth
flavorText: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesnt get along with Galarian Meowth.

name: persian
flavorText: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: psyduck
flavorText: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKMON will use psychokinetic powers.

name: golduck
flavorText: Often seen swim ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.

name: mankey
flavorText: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.

name: primeape
flavorText: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.

name: growlithe
flavorText: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: arcanine
flavorText: A POKMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

name: poliwag
flavorText: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.

name: poliwhirl
flavorText: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: poliwrath
flavorText: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

name: abra
flavorText: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.

name: kadabra
flavorText: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.

name: alakazam
flavorText: Its brain can out perform a super computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.

name: machop
flavorText: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

name: machoke
flavorText: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

name: machamp
flavorText: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.

name: bellsprout
flavorText: A carnivorous POKMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.

name: weepinbell
flavorText: It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.

name: victreebel
flavorText: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: tentacool
flavorText: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.

name: tentacruel
flavorText: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

name: geodude
flavorText: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

name: graveler
flavorText: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

name: golem
flavorText: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.

name: ponyta
flavorText: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.

name: rapidash
flavorText: Very competitive, this POKMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

name: slowpoke
flavorText: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

name: slowbro
flavorText: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.

name: magnemite
flavorText: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.

name: magneton
flavorText: Formed by several MAGNEMITEs linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

name: farfetchd
flavorText: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.

name: doduo
flavorText: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

name: dodrio
flavorText: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.

name: seel
flavorText: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: dewgong
flavorText: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

name: grimer
flavorText: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: muk
flavorText: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: shellder
flavorText: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

name: cloyster
flavorText: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.

name: gastly
flavorText: Almost invisible, this gaseous POKMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

name: haunter
flavorText: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an other dimension.

name: gengar
flavorText: Under a full moon, this POKMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

name: onix
flavorText: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, but colored black.

name: drowzee
flavorText: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.

name: hypno
flavorText: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as HYPNOSIS and CONFUSION.

name: krabby
flavorText: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.

name: kingler
flavorText: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.

name: voltorb
flavorText: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POK BALL, they have zapped many people.

name: electrode
flavorText: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: exeggcute
flavorText: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.

name: exeggutor
flavorText: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.

name: cubone
flavorText: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this POKMON's real face.

name: marowak
flavorText: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

name: hitmonlee
flavorText: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

name: hitmonchan
flavorText: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning fast volleys that are impossible to see.

name: lickitung
flavorText: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.

name: koffing
flavorText: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

name: weezing
flavorText: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.

name: rhyhorn
flavorText: A POKMON with a one-track mind. Once it charges, it won't stop running until it falls asleep.

name: rhydon
flavorText: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.

name: chansey
flavorText: A rare and elusive POKMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.

name: tangela
flavorText: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea weed. Its vines shake as it walks.

name: kangaskhan
flavorText: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.

name: horsea
flavorText: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

name: seadra
flavorText: Capable of swim ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.

name: goldeen
flavorText: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.

name: seaking
flavorText: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.

name: staryu
flavorText: If its body is torn, it can grow back if the red core remains. The core flashes at midnight.

name: starmie
flavorText: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.

name: mr-mime
flavorText: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.

name: scyther
flavorText: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

name: jynx
flavorText: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

name: electabuzz
flavorText: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

name: magmar
flavorText: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: pinsir
flavorText: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.

name: tauros
flavorText: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: magikarp
flavorText: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: gyarados
flavorText: Once it begins to rampage, a GYARADOS will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.

name: lapras
flavorText: A POKMON that has been over hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.

name: ditto
flavorText: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.

name: eevee
flavorText: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.

name: vaporeon
flavorText: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: jolteon
flavorText: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts.

name: flareon
flavorText: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

name: porygon
flavorText: A POKMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: omanyte
flavorText: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.

name: omastar
flavorText: A prehistoric POKMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.

name: kabuto
flavorText: A POKMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

name: kabutops
flavorText: Its sleek shape is perfect for swim ming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

name: aerodactyl
flavorText: A Pokmon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.

name: snorlax
flavorText: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

name: articuno
flavorText: A legendary bird POKMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: zapdos
flavorText: A legendary bird POKMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

name: moltres
flavorText: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: dratini
flavorText: Long considered a mythical POKMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: dragonair
flavorText: A mystical POKMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: dragonite
flavorText: An extremely rarely seen marine POKMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

name: mewtwo
flavorText: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: mew
flavorText: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: chikorita
flavorText: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.

name: bayleef
flavorText: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.

name: meganium
flavorText: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.

name: cyndaquil
flavorText: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.

name: quilava
flavorText: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.

name: typhlosion
flavorText: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: totodile
flavorText: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.

name: croconaw
flavorText: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.

name: feraligatr
flavorText: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

name: sentret
flavorText: A very cautious POKMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.

name: furret
flavorText: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKMON to enter.

name: hoothoot
flavorText: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: noctowl
flavorText: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.

name: ledyba
flavorText: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.

name: ledian
flavorText: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

name: spinarak
flavorText: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.

name: ariados
flavorText: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.

name: crobat
flavorText: It flies so si lently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.

name: chinchou
flavorText: Chinchou blink their shining antennae at one another to claim their respective turf.

name: lanturn
flavorText: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: pichu
flavorText: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.

name: cleffa
flavorText: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: igglybuff
flavorText: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.

name: togepi
flavorText: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

name: togetic
flavorText: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, car ing people and shower them with happiness.

name: natu
flavorText: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star ing at something.

name: xatu
flavorText: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

name: mareep
flavorText: If static elec tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.

name: flaaffy
flavorText: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.

name: ampharos
flavorText: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.

name: bellossom
flavorText: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

name: marill
flavorText: The tip of its tail, which con tains oil that is lighter than wa ter, lets it swim without drowning.

name: azumarill
flavorText: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.

name: sudowoodo
flavorText: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composi tion appears to be closer to a rock than a plant.

name: politoed
flavorText: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather ing from far and wide.

name: hoppip
flavorText: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.

name: skiploom
flavorText: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc tuates up and down.

name: jumpluff
flavorText: Once it catches the wind, it deft ly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.

name: aipom
flavorText: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.

name: sunkern
flavorText: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.

name: sunflora
flavorText: It converts sun light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.

name: yanma
flavorText: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win dows in the area.

name: wooper
flavorText: This POKMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

name: quagsire
flavorText: This carefree POKMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

name: espeon
flavorText: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its ene my's actions.

name: umbreon
flavorText: When agitated, this POKMON pro tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.

name: murkrow
flavorText: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: slowking
flavorText: It has incredible intellect and in tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

name: misdreavus
flavorText: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.

name: unown
flavorText: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab lets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

name: wobbuffet
flavorText: It hates light and shock. If attack ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter strike.

name: girafarig
flavorText: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.

name: pineco
flavorText: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.

name: forretress
flavorText: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.

name: dunsparce
flavorText: When spotted, this POKMON escapes backward by furi ously boring into the ground with its tail.

name: gligar
flavorText: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star tled victim to inject poison.

name: steelix
flavorText: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.

name: snubbull
flavorText: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.

name: granbull
flavorText: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.

name: qwilfish
flavorText: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

name: scizor
flavorText: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.

name: shuckle
flavorText: The BERRIES it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.

name: heracross
flavorText: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.

name: sneasel
flavorText: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

name: teddiursa
flavorText: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.

name: ursaring
flavorText: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.

name: slugma
flavorText: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.

name: magcargo
flavorText: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.

name: swinub
flavorText: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

name: piloswine
flavorText: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.

name: corsola
flavorText: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.

name: remoraid
flavorText: It has superb ac curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.

name: octillery
flavorText: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

name: delibird
flavorText: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.

name: mantine
flavorText: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.

name: skarmory
flavorText: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.

name: houndour
flavorText: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.

name: houndoom
flavorText: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: kingdra
flavorText: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.

name: phanpy
flavorText: It swings its long snout around play fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan gerous.

name: donphan
flavorText: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.

name: porygon2
flavorText: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.

name: stantler
flavorText: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real ity is distorted.

name: smeargle
flavorText: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.

name: tyrogue
flavorText: It is always bursting with en ergy. To make it self stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

name: hitmontop
flavorText: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard.

name: smoochum
flavorText: Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.

name: elekid
flavorText: It rotates its arms to generate electricity, but it tires easily, so it charges up only a little bit.

name: magby
flavorText: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils.

name: miltank
flavorText: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary.

name: blissey
flavorText: Anyone who takes even one bite of BLISSEY's egg be comes unfailingly caring and pleas ant to everyone.

name: raikou
flavorText: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.

name: entei
flavorText: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Un able to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.

name: suicune
flavorText: It races around the world to purify fouled water. It dashes away with the north wind.

name: larvitar
flavorText: It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can grow.

name: pupitar
flavorText: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its THRASHING can topple a mountain.

name: tyranitar
flavorText: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

name: lugia
flavorText: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.

name: ho-oh
flavorText: Legends claim this POKMON flies the world's skies con tinuously on its magnificent seven- colored wings.

name: celebi
flavorText: This POKMON wan ders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.

name: treecko
flavorText: TREECKO has small hooks on the bottom of its feet that enable it to scale vertical walls. This POKMON attacks by slamming foes with its thick tail.

name: grovyle
flavorText: The leaves growing out of GROVYLEs body are convenient for camouflaging it from enemies in the forest. This POKMON is a master at climbing trees in jungles.

name: sceptile
flavorText: The leaves growing on SCEPTILEs body are very sharp edged. This POKMON is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind.

name: torchic
flavorText: TORCHIC sticks with its TRAINER, following behind with unsteady steps. This POKMON breathes fire of over 1,800 degrees F, including fireballs that leave the foe scorched black.

name: combusken
flavorText: COMBUSKEN toughens up its legs and thighs by running through fields and mountains. This POKMONs legs possess both speed and power, enabling it to dole out ten kicks in one second.

name: blaziken
flavorText: In battle, BLAZIKEN blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously. The stronger the foe, the more intensely this POKMONs wrists burn.

name: mudkip
flavorText: The fin on MUDKIPs head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this POKMON can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes.

name: marshtomp
flavorText: The surface of MARSHTOMPs body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This POKMON plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low.

name: swampert
flavorText: SWAMPERT is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This POKMON also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water.

name: poochyena
flavorText: At first sight, POOCHYENA takes a bite at anything that moves. This POKMON chases after prey until the victim becomes exhausted. However, it may turn tail if the prey strikes back.

name: mightyena
flavorText: MIGHTYENA gives obvious signals when it is preparing to attack. It starts to growl deeply and then flattens its body. This POKMON will bite savagely with its sharply pointed fangs.

name: zigzagoon
flavorText: ZIGZAGOON restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This POKMON does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see.

name: linoone
flavorText: LINOONE always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This POKMON is very challenged by gently curving roads.

name: wurmple
flavorText: Using the spikes on its rear end, WURMPLE peels the bark off trees and feeds on the sap that oozes out. This POKMONs feet are tipped with suction pads that allow it to cling to glass without slipping.

name: silcoon
flavorText: SILCOON tethers itself to a tree branch using silk to keep from falling. There, this POKMON hangs quietly while it awaits evolution. It peers out of the silk cocoon through a small hole.

name: beautifly
flavorText: BEAUTIFLYs favorite food is the sweet pollen of flowers. If you want to see this POKMON, just leave a potted flower by an open window. BEAUTIFLY is sure to come looking for pollen.

name: cascoon
flavorText: CASCOON makes its protective cocoon by wrapping its body entirely with a fine silk from its mouth. Once the silk goes around its body, it hardens. This POKMON prepares for its evolution inside the cocoon.

name: dustox
flavorText: DUSTOX is instinctively drawn to light. Swarms of this POKMON are attracted by the bright lights of cities, where they wreak havoc by stripping the leaves off roadside trees for food.

name: lotad
flavorText: It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.

name: lombre
flavorText: It lives at the waters edge where it is sunny. It sleeps on a bed of water grass by day and becomes active at night.

name: ludicolo
flavorText: LUDICOLO begins dancing as soon as it hears cheerful, festive music. This POKMON is said to appear when it hears the singing of children on hiking outings.

name: seedot
flavorText: SEEDOT attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. It sucks moisture from the tree while hanging off the branch. The more water it drinks, the glossier this POKMONs body becomes.

name: nuzleaf
flavorText: NUZLEAF live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This POKMON dislikes having its long nose pinched.

name: shiftry
flavorText: It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.

name: taillow
flavorText: TAILLOW courageously stands its ground against foes, however strong they may be. This gutsy POKMON will remain defiant even after a loss. On the other hand, it cries loudly if it becomes hungry.

name: swellow
flavorText: SWELLOW flies high above our heads, making graceful arcs in the sky. This POKMON dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. The hapless prey is tightly grasped by SWELLOWs clawed feet, preventing escape.

name: wingull
flavorText: WINGULL has the habit of carrying prey and valuables in its beak and hiding them in all sorts of locations. This POKMON rides the winds and flies as if it were skating across the sky.

name: pelipper
flavorText: It is a messenger of the skies, carrying small Pokmon and eggs to safety in its bill.

name: ralts
flavorText: RALTS senses the emotions of people using the horns on its head. This POKMON rarely appears before people. But when it does, it draws closer if it senses that the person has a positive disposition.

name: kirlia
flavorText: It is said that a KIRLIA that is exposed to the positive emotions of its TRAINER grows beautiful. This POKMON controls psychokinetic powers with its highly developed brain.

name: gardevoir
flavorText: GARDEVOIR has the ability to read the future. If it senses impending danger to its TRAINER, this POKMON is said to unleash its psychokinetic energy at full power.

name: surskit
flavorText: From the tips of its feet, SURSKIT secretes an oil that enables it to walk on water as if it were skating. This POKMON feeds on microscopic organisms in ponds and lakes.

name: masquerain
flavorText: MASQUERAIN intimidates enemies with the eyelike patterns on its antennas. This POKMON flaps its four wings to freely fly in any direction - even sideways and backwards - as if it were a helicopter.

name: shroomish
flavorText: SHROOMISH live in damp soil in the dark depths of forests. They are often found keeping still under fallen leaves. This POKMON feeds on compost that is made up of fallen, rotted leaves.

name: breloom
flavorText: BRELOOM closes in on its foe with light and sprightly footwork, then throws punches with its stretchy arms. This POKMONs fighting technique puts boxers to shame.

name: slakoth
flavorText: SLAKOTH lolls around for over twenty hours every day. Because it moves so little, it does not need much food. This POKMONs sole daily meal consists of just three leaves.

name: vigoroth
flavorText: VIGOROTH is always itching and agitated to go on a wild rampage. It simply cant tolerate sitting still for even a minute. This POKMONs stress level rises if it cant be moving constantly.

name: slaking
flavorText: SLAKING spends all day lying down and lolling about. It eats grass growing within its reach. If it eats all the grass it can reach, this POKMON reluctantly moves to another spot.

name: nincada
flavorText: NINCADA lives underground for many years in complete darkness. This POKMON absorbs nutrients from the roots of trees. It stays motionless as it waits for evolution.

name: ninjask
flavorText: NINJASK moves around at such a high speed that it cannot be seen, even while its crying can be clearly heard. For that reason, this POKMON was long believed to be invisible.

name: shedinja
flavorText: SHEDINJAs hard body doesnt move - not even a twitch. In fact, its body appears to be merely a hollow shell. It is believed that this POKMON will steal the spirit of anyone peering into its hollow body from its back.

name: whismur
flavorText: Normally, WHISMURs voice is very quiet - it is barely audible even if one is paying close attention. However, if this POKMON senses danger, it starts crying at an earsplitting volume.

name: loudred
flavorText: LOUDREDs bellowing can completely decimate a wood-frame house. It uses its voice to punish its foes. This POKMONs round ears serve as loudspeakers.

name: exploud
flavorText: EXPLOUD triggers earthquakes with the tremors it creates by bellowing. If this POKMON violently inhales from the ports on its body, its a sign that it is preparing to let loose a huge bellow.

name: makuhita
flavorText: MAKUHITA is tenacious - it will keep getting up and attacking its foe however many times it is knocked down. Every time it gets back up, this POKMON stores more energy in its body for evolving.

name: hariyama
flavorText: It has the habit of challenging others without hesitation to tests of strength. Its been known to stand on train tracks and stop trains using forearm thrusts.

name: azurill
flavorText: A Pokmon that lives by water. It moves quickly on land by bouncing on its big tail.

name: nosepass
flavorText: NOSEPASSs magnetic nose is always pointed to the north. If two of these POKMON meet, they cannot turn their faces to each other when they are close because their magnetic noses repel one another.

name: skitty
flavorText: SKITTY has the habit of becoming fascinated by moving objects and chasing them around. This POKMON is known to chase after its own tail and become dizzy.

name: delcatty
flavorText: DELCATTY prefers to live an unfettered existence in which it can do as it pleases at its own pace. Because this POKMON eats and sleeps whenever it decides, its daily routines are completely random.

name: sableye
flavorText: SABLEYE lead quiet lives deep inside caverns. They are feared, however, because these POKMON are thought to steal the spirits of people when their eyes burn with a sinister glow in the darkness.

name: mawile
flavorText: MAWHILEs huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.

name: aron
flavorText: This POKMON has a body of steel. To make its body, ARON feeds on iron ore that it digs from mountains. Occasionally, it causes major trouble by eating bridges and rails.

name: lairon
flavorText: LAIRON tempers its steel body by drinking highly nutritious mineral springwater until it is bloated. This POKMON makes its nest close to springs of delicious water.

name: aggron
flavorText: AGGRON claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This POKMON vigilantly patrols its territory at all times.

name: meditite
flavorText: MEDITITE undertakes rigorous mental training deep in the mountains. However, whenever it meditates, this POKMON always loses its concentration and focus. As a result, its training never ends.

name: medicham
flavorText: It is said that through meditation, MEDICHAM heightens energy inside its body and sharpens its sixth sense. This POKMON hides its presence by merging itself with fields and mountains.

name: electrike
flavorText: ELECTRIKE stores electricity in its long body hair. This POKMON stimulates its leg muscles with electric charges. These jolts of power give its legs explosive acceleration performance.

name: manectric
flavorText: MANECTRIC is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this POKMON creates thunderclouds.

name: plusle
flavorText: PLUSLE always acts as a cheerleader for its partners. Whenever a teammate puts out a good effort in battle, this POKMON shorts out its body to create the crackling noises of sparks to show its joy.

name: minun
flavorText: MINUN is more concerned about cheering on its partners than its own safety. It shorts out the electricity in its body to create brilliant showers of sparks to cheer on its teammates.

name: volbeat
flavorText: With the arrival of night, VOLBEAT emits light from its tail. It communicates with others by adjusting the intensity and flashing of its light. This POKMON is attracted by the sweet aroma of ILLUMISE.

name: illumise
flavorText: With its sweet aroma, it guides Volbeat to draw signs with light in the night sky.

name: roselia
flavorText: ROSELIA shoots sharp thorns as projectiles at any opponent that tries to steal the flowers on its arms. The aroma of this POKMON brings serenity to living things.

name: gulpin
flavorText: Virtually all of GULPINs body is its stomach. As a result, it can swallow something its own size. This POKMONs stomach contains a special fluid that digests anything.

name: swalot
flavorText: When SWALOT spots prey, it spurts out a hideously toxic fluid from its pores and sprays the target. Once the prey has weakened, this POKMON gulps it down whole with its cavernous mouth.

name: carvanha
flavorText: CARVANHAs strongly developed jaws and its sharply pointed fangs pack the destructive power to rip out boat hulls. Many boats have been attacked and sunk by this POKMON.

name: sharpedo
flavorText: Nicknamed the bully of the sea, SHARPEDO is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these POKMON can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker.

name: wailmer
flavorText: WAILMERs nostrils are located above its eyes. This playful POKMON loves to startle people by forcefully snorting out seawater it stores inside its body out of its nostrils.

name: wailord
flavorText: WAILORD is the largest of all identified POKMON up to now. This giant POKMON swims languorously in the vast open sea, eating massive amounts of food at once with its enormous mouth.

name: numel
flavorText: NUMEL is extremely dull witted - it doesnt notice being hit. However, it cant stand hunger for even a second. This POKMONs body is a seething cauldron of boiling magma.

name: camerupt
flavorText: CAMERUPT has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees F courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this POKMONs back erupt, spewing the superheated magma.

name: torkoal
flavorText: You can tell how its feeling by the smoke spouting from its shell. Tremendous velocity is a sign of good health.

name: spoink
flavorText: SPOINK bounces around on its tail. The shock of its bouncing makes its heart pump. As a result, this POKMON cannot afford to stop bouncing - if it stops, its heart will stop.

name: grumpig
flavorText: GRUMPIG uses the black pearls on its body to amplify its psychic power waves for gaining total control over its foe. When this POKMON uses its special power, its snorting breath grows labored.

name: spinda
flavorText: No two Spinda have the same pattern of spots. Its tottering step fouls the aim of foes.

name: trapinch
flavorText: TRAPINCHs nest is a sloped, bowl-like pit dug in sand. This POKMON patiently waits for prey to tumble down the pit. Its giant jaws have enough strength to crush even boulders.

name: vibrava
flavorText: To make prey faint, VIBRAVA generates ultrasonic waves by vigorously making its two wings vibrate. This POKMONs ultrasonic waves are so powerful, they can bring on headaches in people.

name: flygon
flavorText: FLYGON is nicknamed the elemental spirit of the desert. Because its flapping wings whip up a cloud of sand, this POKMON is always enveloped in a sandstorm while flying.

name: cacnea
flavorText: CACNEA lives in arid locations such as deserts. It releases a strong aroma from its flower to attract prey. When prey comes near, this POKMON shoots sharp thorns from its body to bring the victim down.

name: cacturne
flavorText: During the daytime, CACTURNE remains unmoving so that it does not lose any moisture to the harsh desert sun. This POKMON becomes active at night when the temperature drops.

name: swablu
flavorText: SWABLU has light and fluffy wings that are like cottony clouds. This POKMON is not frightened of people. It lands on the heads of people and sits there like a cotton-fluff hat.

name: altaria
flavorText: ALTARIA dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this POKMON makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment.

name: zangoose
flavorText: Memories of battling its arch-rival SEVIPER are etched into every cell of ZANGOOSEs body. This POKMON adroitly dodges attacks with incredible agility.

name: seviper
flavorText: SEVIPER shares a generations-long feud with ZANGOOSE. The scars on its body are evidence of vicious battles. This POKMON attacks using its sword- edged tail.

name: lunatone
flavorText: LUNATONE was discovered at a location where a meteorite fell. As a result, some people theorize that this POKMON came from space. However, no one has been able to prove this theory so far.

name: solrock
flavorText: Solar energy is the source of its power, so it is strong during the daytime. When it spins, its body shines.

name: barboach
flavorText: BARBOACHs sensitive whiskers serve as a superb radar system. This POKMON hides in mud, leaving only its two whiskers exposed while it waits for prey to come along.

name: whiscash
flavorText: WHISCASH is extremely territorial. Just one of these POKMON will claim a large pond as its exclusive territory. If a foe approaches it, it thrashes about and triggers a massive earthquake.

name: corphish
flavorText: Its hardy vitality enables it to adapt to any environment. Its pincers will never release prey.

name: crawdaunt
flavorText: CRAWDAUNT has an extremely violent nature that compels it to challenge other living things to battle. Other life-forms refuse to live in ponds inhabited by this POKMON, making them desolate places.

name: baltoy
flavorText: BALTOY moves while spinning around on its one foot. Primitive wall paintings depicting this POKMON living among people were discovered in some ancient ruins.

name: claydol
flavorText: CLAYDOL are said to be dolls of mud made by primitive humans and brought to life by exposure to a mysterious ray. This POKMON moves about while levitating.

name: lileep
flavorText: LILEEP became extinct approximately a hundred million years ago. This ancient POKMON attaches itself to a rock on the seafloor and catches approaching prey using tentacles shaped like flower petals.

name: cradily
flavorText: CRADILY roams around the ocean floor in search of food. This POKMON freely extends its tree trunk-like neck and captures unwary prey using its eight tentacles.

name: anorith
flavorText: ANORITH was regenerated from a prehistoric fossil. This primitive POKMON once lived in warm seas. It grips its prey firmly between its two large claws.

name: armaldo
flavorText: ARMALDOs tough armor makes all attacks bounce off. This POKMONs two enormous claws can be freely extended or contracted. They have the power to punch right through a steel slab.

name: feebas
flavorText: FEEBASs fins are ragged and tattered from the start of its life. Because of its shoddy appearance, this POKMON is largely ignored. It is capable of living in both the sea and in rivers.

name: milotic
flavorText: Its lovely scales are described as rainbow colored. They change color depending on the viewing angle.

name: castform
flavorText: CASTFORMs appearance changes with the weather. This POKMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.

name: kecleon
flavorText: It changes body color to blend in with its surroundings. It also changes color if it is happy or sad.

name: shuppet
flavorText: SHUPPET is attracted by feelings of jealousy and vindictiveness. If someone develops strong feelings of vengeance, this POKMON will appear in a swarm and line up beneath the eaves of that persons home.

name: banette
flavorText: BANETTE generates energy for laying strong curses by sticking pins into its own body. This POKMON was originally a pitiful plush doll that was thrown away.

name: duskull
flavorText: DUSKULL can pass through any wall no matter how thick it may be. Once this POKMON chooses a target, it will doggedly pursue the intended victim until the break of dawn.

name: dusclops
flavorText: DUSCLOPSs body is completely hollow - there is nothing at all inside. It is said that its body is like a black hole. This POKMON will absorb anything into its body, but nothing will ever come back out.

name: tropius
flavorText: The bunches of fruit around TROPIUSs neck are very popular with children. This POKMON loves fruit, and eats it continuously. Apparently, its love for fruit resulted in its own outgrowth of fruit.

name: chimecho
flavorText: CHIMECHO makes its cries echo inside its hollow body. When this POKMON becomes enraged, its cries result in ultrasonic waves that have the power to knock foes flying.

name: absol
flavorText: Every time ABSOL appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster POKMON.

name: wynaut
flavorText: WYNAUT can always be seen with a big, happy smile on its face. Look at its tail to determine if it is angry. When angered, this POKMON will be slapping the ground with its tail.

name: snorunt
flavorText: SNORUNT live in regions with heavy snowfall. In seasons without snow, such as spring and summer, this POKMON steals away to live quietly among stalactites and stalagmites deep in caverns.

name: glalie
flavorText: GLALIE has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This POKMON has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires.

name: spheal
flavorText: SPHEAL is much faster rolling than walking to get around. When groups of this POKMON eat, they all clap at once to show their pleasure. Because of this, their mealtimes are noisy.

name: sealeo
flavorText: SEALEO has the habit of always juggling on the tip of its nose anything it sees for the first time. This POKMON occasionally entertains itself by balancing and rolling a SPHEAL on its nose.

name: walrein
flavorText: It swims through icy seas while shattering ice floes with its large tusks. It is protected by its thick blubber.

name: clamperl
flavorText: CLAMPERLs sturdy shell is not only good for protection - it is also used for clamping and catching prey. A fully grown CLAMPERLs shell will be scored with nicks and scratches all over.

name: huntail
flavorText: HUNTAILs presence went unnoticed by people for a long time because it lives at extreme depths in the sea. This POKMONs eyes can see clearly even in the murky dark depths of the ocean.

name: gorebyss
flavorText: GOREBYSS lives in the southern seas at extreme depths. Its body is built to withstand the enormous pressure of water at incredible depths. Because of this, this POKMONs body is unharmed by ordinary attacks.

name: relicanth
flavorText: RELICANTH is a POKMON species that existed for a hundred million years without ever changing its form. This ancient POKMON feeds on microscopic organisms with its toothless mouth.

name: luvdisc
flavorText: LUVDISC live in shallow seas in the tropics. This heart-shaped POKMON earned its name by swimming after loving couples it spotted in the oceans waves.

name: bagon
flavorText: Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.

name: shelgon
flavorText: Inside SHELGONs armor-like shell, cells are in the midst of transformation to create an entirely new body. This POKMONs shell is extremely heavy, making its movements sluggish.

name: salamence
flavorText: SALAMENCE came about as a result of a strong, long-held dream of growing wings. It is said that this powerful desire triggered a sudden mutation in this POKMONs cells, causing it to sprout its magnificent wings.

name: beldum
flavorText: Instead of blood, a powerful magnetic force courses throughout BELDUMs body. This POKMON communicates with others by sending controlled pulses of magnetism.

name: metang
flavorText: When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG is formed. The brains of the BELDUM are joined by a magnetic nervous system. By linking its brains magnetically, this POKMON generates strong psychokinetic power.

name: metagross
flavorText: METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.

name: regirock
flavorText: Its entire body is made of rock. If any part chips off in battle, it attaches rocks to repair itself.

name: regice
flavorText: REGICEs body was made during an ice age. The deep-frozen body cant be melted, even by fire. This POKMON controls frigid air of minus 328 degrees F.

name: registeel
flavorText: REGISTEEL has a body that is harder than any kind of metal. Its body is apparently hollow. No one has any idea what this POKMON eats.

name: latias
flavorText: LATIAS is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. If it senses any hostility, this POKMON ruffles the feathers all over its body and cries shrilly to intimidate the foe.

name: latios
flavorText: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKMON is intelligent and understands human speech.

name: kyogre
flavorText: KYOGRE has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This POKMON saved people who were suffering from droughts.

name: groudon
flavorText: GROUDON has long been described in mythology as the POKMON that raised lands and expanded continents. This POKMON took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.

name: rayquaza
flavorText: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earths ozone layer, never descending to the ground. This POKMON appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere.

name: jirachi
flavorText: A legend states that JIRACHI will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens. If this POKMON senses danger, it will fight without awakening.

name: deoxys-normal
flavorText: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKMONs chest appears to be its brain.

name: turtwig
flavorText: Made from soil, the shell on its back hardens when it drinks water. It lives along lakes.

name: grotle
flavorText: It knows where pure water wells up. It carries fellow Pokmon there on its back.

name: torterra
flavorText: Small Pokmon occasionally gather on its unmoving back to begin building their nests.

name: chimchar
flavorText: It agilely scales sheer cliffs to live atop craggy mountains. Its fire is put out when it sleeps.

name: monferno
flavorText: To intimidate attackers, it stretches the fire on its tail to make itself appear bigger.

name: infernape
flavorText: It uses a special kind of martial arts involving all its limbs. Its fire never goes out.

name: piplup
flavorText: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

name: prinplup
flavorText: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.

name: empoleon
flavorText: The three horns that extend from its beak attest to its power. The leader has the biggest horns.

name: starly
flavorText: They flock in great numbers. Though small, they flap their wings with great power.

name: staravia
flavorText: It flies around forests and fields in search of bug Pokmon. It stays within a huge flock.

name: staraptor
flavorText: It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger.

name: bidoof
flavorText: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

name: bibarel
flavorText: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.

name: kricketot
flavorText: It shakes its head back to front, causing its antennae to hit each other and sound like a xylophone.

name: kricketune
flavorText: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib.

name: shinx
flavorText: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.

name: luxio
flavorText: Its claws loose electricity with enough amperage to cause fainting. They live in small groups.

name: luxray
flavorText: It has eyes that can see through anything. It spots and captures prey hiding behind objects.

name: budew
flavorText: Over the winter, it closes its bud and endures the cold. In spring, the bud opens and releases pollen.

name: roserade
flavorText: It attracts prey with a sweet aroma, then downs it with thorny whips hidden in its arms.

name: cranidos
flavorText: It lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron.

name: rampardos
flavorText: Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.

name: shieldon
flavorText: A Pokmon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.

name: bastiodon
flavorText: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokmon that feeds on grass and berries.

name: burmy
flavorText: To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.

name: wormadam-plant
flavorText: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokmons body. The cloak is never shed.

name: mothim
flavorText: It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by COMBEE.

name: combee
flavorText: A Pokmon formed by three others. It busily carries sweet floral honey to VESPIQUEN.

name: vespiquen
flavorText: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by COMBEE.

name: pachirisu
flavorText: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.

name: buizel
flavorText: It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out.

name: floatzel
flavorText: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.

name: cherubi
flavorText: The small ball holds the nutrients needed for evolution. Apparently, it is very sweet and tasty.

name: cherrim
flavorText: It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud.

name: shellos
flavorText: Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed.

name: gastrodon
flavorText: It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it grows right back.

name: ambipom
flavorText: To eat, it deftly shucks nuts with its two tails. It rarely uses its arms now.

name: drifloon
flavorText: A Pokmon formed by the spirits of people and Pokmon. It loves damp, humid seasons.

name: drifblim
flavorText: At dusk, swarms of them are carried aloft on winds. When noticed, they suddenly vanish.

name: buneary
flavorText: It slams foes by sharply uncoiling its rolled ears. It stings enough to make a grown-up cry in pain.

name: lopunny
flavorText: An extremely cautious Pokmon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.

name: mismagius
flavorText: Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations.

name: honchkrow
flavorText: Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous MURKROW in tow.

name: glameow
flavorText: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.

name: purugly
flavorText: It is a brazen brute that barges its way into another Pokmons nest and claims it as its own.

name: chingling
flavorText: It emits cries by agitating an orb at the back of its throat. It moves with flouncing hops.

name: stunky
flavorText: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.

name: skuntank
flavorText: It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.

name: bronzor
flavorText: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

name: bronzong
flavorText: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.

name: bonsly
flavorText: It looks as if it is always crying. It is actually adjusting its bodys fluid levels by eliminating excess.

name: mime-jr
flavorText: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokmon.

name: happiny
flavorText: It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of CHANSEY.

name: chatot
flavorText: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

name: spiritomb
flavorText: A Pokmon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.

name: gible
flavorText: It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close.

name: gabite
flavorText: There is a long-held belief that medicine made from its scales will heal even incurable illnesses.

name: garchomp
flavorText: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.

name: munchlax
flavorText: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.

name: riolu
flavorText: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.

name: lucario
flavorText: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.

name: hippopotas
flavorText: It lives in arid places. Instead of perspiration, it expels grainy sand from its body.

name: hippowdon
flavorText: It blasts internally stored sand from ports on its body to create a towering twister for attack.

name: skorupi
flavorText: It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.

name: drapion
flavorText: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.

name: croagunk
flavorText: Its cheeks hold poison sacs. It tries to catch foes off guard to jab them with toxic fingers.

name: toxicroak
flavorText: Its knuckle claws secrete a toxin so vile that even a scratch could prove fatal.

name: carnivine
flavorText: It attracts prey with its sweet- smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

name: finneon
flavorText: After long exposure to sunlight, the patterns on its tail fins shine vividly when darkness arrives.

name: lumineon
flavorText: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.

name: mantyke
flavorText: A friendly Pokmon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.

name: snover
flavorText: It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive.

name: abomasnow
flavorText: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.

name: weavile
flavorText: They live in cold regions, forming groups of four or five that hunt prey with impressive coordination.

name: magnezone
flavorText: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

name: lickilicky
flavorText: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.

name: rhyperior
flavorText: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. GEODUDE are shot at rare times.

name: tangrowth
flavorText: It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing arms to predators does not trouble it.

name: electivire
flavorText: As its electric charge amplifies, blue sparks begin to crackle between its horns.

name: magmortar
flavorText: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.

name: togekiss
flavorText: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.

name: yanmega
flavorText: By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.

name: leafeon
flavorText: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.

name: glaceon
flavorText: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.

name: gliscor
flavorText: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

name: mamoswine
flavorText: Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age.

name: porygon-z
flavorText: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokmon. It began acting oddly, however.

name: gallade
flavorText: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.

name: probopass
flavorText: It freely controls three small units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force.

name: dusknoir
flavorText: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.

name: froslass
flavorText: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.

name: rotom
flavorText: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

name: uxie
flavorText: Known as The Being of Knowledge. It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.

name: mesprit
flavorText: Known as The Being of Emotion. It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

name: azelf
flavorText: Known as The Being of Willpower. It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.

name: dialga
flavorText: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.

name: palkia
flavorText: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

name: heatran
flavorText: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: regigigas
flavorText: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokmon towed continents with ropes.

name: giratina-altered
flavorText: A Pokmon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.

name: cresselia
flavorText: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: phione
flavorText: It drifts in warm seas. It always returns to where it was born, no matter how far it may have drifted.

name: manaphy
flavorText: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.

name: darkrai
flavorText: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: shaymin-land
flavorText: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.

name: arceus
flavorText: It is described in mythology as the Pokmon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.
